content: Claude Code Agent Skills: SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter (--- markers). Required: description (recommended, not mandatory; directs auto-invocation). Optional: name (display name), when_to_use, argument-hint, arguments, disable-model-invocation, user-invocable, allowed-tools, disallowed-tools, model, effort, context (fork), agent, hooks, paths, shell. Command name = directory name (not frontmatter name). Plugin skills: <plugin>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md -> /plugin:name. Plugin has .claude-plugin/plugin.json (name, version, description). Supporting files in skill dir: scripts/, references/, examples/. Live change detection in skill directories.
